news.headline: Why SpaceX Stock Soared Today
news.summary: The largest IPO of all time had a blockbuster first day of trading.

news.headline: SpaceX Settles
news.summary: Bankers working the deal, led by Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley as the co-lead, priced SpaceX at $135/share last night, giving the company a market cap of roughly $1.77 trillion.

news.headline: Can Apple Stock Double to $600 in 5 Years?
news.summary: After shares posted a 134% trailing five-year gain, investors are now focused on what the next half decade will bring.

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $721.34 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $741.75 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Bullish — favor defined-risk spreads.
Use QQQ $721.34 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: META PUT — enter $19.24–$21.26, target $30.38+, stop $12.15.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a firmer open with QQQ +0.59% and SPY +0.54%. Composite sentiment +28 (Bullish). The tape is being driven mainly by vix, spy trend, qqq / mega-cap tech. VIX at 12.71 (-4.59%). Environment read: favor defined-risk spreads. Financials (+0.95%) is leading while Healthcare (-2.41%) lags. Premarket strength in AMD, JPM; weakness in LLY, PLTR. The desk's highest-conviction setup is META (6.5/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
